query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_gates,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digest_safe = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as digest_safe_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN digest_safe = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_safe_count
FROM project_validation_gates;
